template_data.sub: Your GSA pricing ceiling is negotiated once — and locked for years. Build the story before you file.

image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'WRONG QUESTION' with red X icon. Two short labels: 'What to charge' and 'Market rate guess'. Right panel white/cream, bold label 'RIGHT QUESTION' with green checkmark icon. Two short labels: 'Defend in audit' and 'Basis of Award'. Center: illustrated professional in suit holding document, standing at crossroads. Bold headline top: 'PRICE WHAT YOU CAN DEFEND.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
